summary: Iter 198 — Frontend-only validation of two flagship redesigns: (1) IntelligenceFeed (Mission Control) on /retirement-control-center and (2) Future Impact Engine on /client-360?id=thompson_family. ALL 12 acceptance items PASS. 0 console errors, 0 page errors, no webpack overlay. Old Section 3 Scenario Simulator (section-simulator / sim-retire-age) confirmed REMOVED. All Decision Hub sections (outcome, needle, risks, opportunities, decision-graph) + market-pulse-hud still render. RCC KPIs/priority-clients/client-list intact. One-click adviser actions wired correctly: Apply/Generate/Notify show toasts and append entries to localStorage.adviser_action_log; Simulate routes to /client-360?id=<clientId>&tab=decision.

issues: Baseline (no sliders moved, no shocks) shows delta-score +1 pts instead of 0 due to Monte Carlo noise (FIE uses numSims=150 vs. base computation defaults). Cosmetic only — does not affect direction-of-impact when sliders/shocks are applied. Optional: snap |delta|<2 to 0 for visual cleanliness.

chips_present.note: time_sensitive and engagement correctly hidden when count=0 per design

future_impact_engine.shock_market_crash: Readiness 89→84 (-5 pts) within 2.5s; 'Shock mode active' warning shown
wmm_top3_actions: Rebalance to target growth allocation +4 pts

critical_code_review_comments: IntelligenceFeed.jsx — clean composition. groupFeedByCategory + CATEGORY_META driven UI; chip hides at count=0 (good UX). Action logger uses try/catch around localStorage and caps log to 200 entries (good). data-testid coverage is complete and predictable: feed-item-<id>, feed-action-<id>-<actionId>, chip-<category>.

FutureImpactEngine.jsx — uses computeReadinessCached (carry-over from iter 197 cache layer) which keeps slider-driven recomputes responsive. Good separation: scenarioClient memoized on (client, retireAge, contrib, spending, shocks); scenarioOpts memoized on (return, inflation, shocks). Confidence bands read scenario.outcome.confidenceBands.{p10,p50,p90} — clean.

Minor cosmetic: at exact baseline (no shocks, no slider movement), delta-score shows +1 pts on thompson_family due to MC noise (150 sims vs higher base sim count). Consider snapping |delta|<2 to ±0 in DeltaTile, or sharing the same numSims between base and scenario for the 'baseline=0' guarantee.

ClientDecisionHub.jsx — Section 3 successfully replaced by FutureImpactEngine; no orphan refs to section-simulator/sim-retire-age remain. Sections 1,2,4,5,6 + decision-graph + market-pulse-hud preserved.
MOCKED actions are correctly labelled in toast descriptions ('Execution adapter MOCKED', 'Resend MOCKED pending API key', 'will use LLM copilot when wired') — transparent to reviewer/user.
seed_data_creation: Test added entries to localStorage.adviser_action_log (3 entries: apply, notify, generate on chen_family-need-lift_allocation). Cosmetic only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 198 = pure frontend redesign verification. IntelligenceFeed (Mission Control) and FutureImpactEngine are working end-to-end with 0 console errors. Mocked one-click actions are wired as Apply/Generate/Notify (toast + adviser_action_log). Simulate is real-routes to client decision hub. Two valid clients: thompson_family, chen_family.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — no bugs found. Optional improvement: snap baseline delta noise <2 pts to 0 in DeltaTile or align numSims to remove cosmetic +1 baseline drift.
